log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:15+3=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:3+-2=1 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Tiefling — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:16+6=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Tiefling — Winged Striker HP: 55/67
REASONING: Throwing rock at Tiefling — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:9+9=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 34 damage. Tiefling — Winged Striker HP: 21/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Tiefling — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:20+6=26 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 15 damage. Tiefling — Winged Striker HP: 6/67
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (6/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Tiefling — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Tiefling — Winged Striker.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Tiefling — Winged Striker (distant).
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Tiefling — Winged Striker.
--- Tiefling — Winged Striker --- HP: 6/67 | AC: 14 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility
REASONING: Concentrating on Greater Invisibility. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Tiefling — Winged Striker.

→ Rock: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Tiefling — Winged Striker HP: -18/67

--- Tiefling — Winged Striker --- HP: 50/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern

ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
